question: How many stove burners are occupied by cookware when the person wearing a white chef's coat rests their left hand against the wall?
Which accessory worn by the man is described as having white stripes? A. White apron B. Black neckerchief C. White chef's coat D. Strap
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man with short dark hair wearing a white chef's coat stands at a white gas stove preparing food. A black frying pan containing food sits on the front burner next to a black pot with a lid on the back burner. A black refrigerator stands to the left of the stove while a framed picture hangs on the wall above.

question: Did the chef perform BOTH tasting food with his finger AND sprinkling seasoning? A. only tasting food with his finger B. only sprinkling seasoning C. both tasting food with his finger and sprinkling seasoning D. neither
Where is the black pot with a lid positioned? A. On the back burner B. Around the man's neck C. To the left of the man D. On the wall
Where is the framed picture with text located in the kitchen? A. On the back burner B. To the left of the man C. On the wall D. On the front burner
Describe the sequence of actions the chef performs while cooking at the stove throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the chef smells the food in the pan; at 2s, he tastes the food using his finger; at 12s, he sprinkles seasoning into the frying pan with his left hand; at 14s, he stirs the food inside the black frying pan; at 18s, he holds the handle of the frying pan with his right hand.

question: Has the person wearing a white chef's coat started chopping mushrooms on the white cutting board yet?

He kept the spatula in his hand throughout the entire video

Given what is visible so far, could the person wearing a white chef's coat chop the mushrooms? A. Yes — kitchen knife, white cutting board, and brown mushrooms are all present B. No — no kitchen knife visible in hand C. No — no white cutting board on counter D. No — no brown mushrooms to chop
